new_information: Added a repository-specific general update workflow that defines how to gather all new repository context since the previous standardized general-update commit, propagate impacts across canonical artifacts, and commit the result with an exact marker subject and explicit body fields.
impact_on_existing_information: The workflows folder now contains an explicit repo-wide refresh procedure, not just point workflows like meeting summarization. Future general updates should use git history as the anchor, review all active sections for downstream impact, and avoid disconnected summary documents when canonical artifacts can be updated directly.
